dhamek stupa.title: Dhamek Stupa
dhamek stupa.description: A massive 43.6-meter tall stone and brick structure built by Emperor Ashoka. It marks the exact spot where Lord Buddha delivered his first sermon to his five disciples.

chaukhandi_stupa.title: Chaukhandi Stupa
chaukhandi_stupa.description: An ancient Buddhist stupa marking the spot where Lord Buddha reunited with his first disciples. It is uniquely topped by an octagonal Mughal tower built later by Humayun.

the_giant_buddha.title: The Giant Buddha
the_giant_buddha.description: An impressive and serene 80-foot tall standing statue of Lord Buddha. It is a major spiritual landmark located within the beautiful premises of the Thai Temple complex.

chinese_buddhist_temple,.title: Chinese Buddhist Temple
chinese_buddhist_temple,.description: A peaceful monastery showcasing traditional Chinese architecture, red lanterns, and authentic artwork. It offers a calm, quiet sanctuary for meditation.

tibetan_temple_varanasi.title: Tibetan Temple Varanasi
tibetan_temple_varanasi.description: A beautifully decorated shrine built in the traditional Tibetan architectural style. It features a stunning statue of Shakyamuni Buddha and large, vibrant prayer wheels.

japanese_temple.title: Japanese Temple
japanese_temple.description: Known as Nichigai Suzan Horinji, this temple features a minimalist Zen wooden design. It houses a large reclining Buddha statue and features a serene garden atmosphere.

sarnath_buddhist_temple,.title: Sarnath Buddhist Temple (Mulagandha Kuti Vihar)
sarnath_buddhist_temple,.description: A prominent modern temple adorned with exquisite interior frescoes painted by a Japanese artist. It houses a sacred gold-plated statue of Lord Buddha.

cambodian_temple_sarnath.title: Cambodian Temple Sarnath
cambodian_temple_sarnath.description: A unique religious site featuring striking Cambodian Khmer-style architecture. The outer walls display detailed reliefs illustrating scenes from the life of Buddha.

thai_temple.title: Thai Temple
thai_temple.description: An authentic Thai monastery surrounded by manicured gardens. It is highly popular for hosting the majestic 80-foot standing Giant Buddha statue.

vishwa_shanti_stupa.title: Vishwa Shanti Stupa
vishwa_shanti_stupa.description: A majestic white peace pagoda constructed to symbolize global harmony and non-violence. It sits within a beautifully landscaped spiritual garden perfect for meditation.

sarnath_museum.title: Sarnath Museum
sarnath_museum.description: The oldest site museum of the Archaeological Survey of India. It proudly houses the legendary Lion Capital of Ashoka, which serves as India's national emblem.

dharma_chakra.title: Dharma Chakra
dharma_chakra.description: A symbolic monument representing the Wheel of Dharma. It honors the core site where Buddha set the cosmic wheel of law into motion during his initial teachings.

sarnath_deer_park.title: Sarnath Deer Park
sarnath_deer_park.description: The historical park landscape where Lord Buddha delivered his first discourse. Today, it operates as a green, peaceful enclosure where visitors can spot free-roaming deer.
